title: Implementation Project Manager (Contract)  #dl
description:
Responsibilities:

• Lead end-to-end project lifecycle from initiation to implementation, ensuring successful delivery.

• Develop and maintain detailed project plans, including scope, timelines, and resource allocation.

• Manage stakeholder communication and expectations across all levels of the organization.

• Facilitate requirements gathering sessions and validate deliverables against business needs.

• Collaborate with quality assurance teams to ensure thorough testing and successful project delivery.

• Run governance routines, senior working groups, and prepare project dashboards and reports.

• Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks and issues, ensuring timely escalation and resolution.

• Coordinate cross-functional teams and manage dependencies between workstreams.

• Manage project financials, resource planning, and variance tracking.

• Leverage AI-driven analytics and automation tools to improve reporting and forecasting.

• Identify opportunities for process improvement and AI integration within project workflows.

• Support change management activities and ensure smooth adoption of project outcomes.

• Ensure compliance with governance frameworks and organizational standards.

Requirements

  • 8+Years of experience
  • Proven track record of delivering complex projects on time and on budget, with ability to manage multiple projects concurrently.
  • Technical Skills: Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Project, Visio) and project management tools (e.g., MS Project, JIRA).
  • Strong influencing, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
  • Experience with project methodologies (Agile, PRINCE2, PMP).
  • Ops SME in Project
  • Good/ excellent in stakeholder management
  • Solid knowledge of ops lifecycle
  • Good to have – exposure to co-pilot/AI

What you need to do now  

If you're interested in this role, click 'apply now'to forward an up-to-date copy of your CV, or call Denise at Hays on +65 96110531 or email denise.lee@hays.com.sg for a confidential discussion.  

Referrals are welcome. 

EA Reg Number: R21103035 

EA License Number: 07C3924 | Company Registration No:200609504D
